title: P@dahtsuwr #6301
definition:
Pedahzur = "the Rock has ransomed"

 1) father of Gamaliel who was the chief of the tribe of Manasseh at
    the time of the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pedahzur = "the Rock has ransomed"

 1) father of Gamaliel who was the chief of the tribe of Manasseh at
    the time of the exodus

    NASB:  the rock has ransomed, a Manassite
